'''Tempest Scout 6''' was an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] in [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]. It was modified for perimeter patrol. Its elite crew trained for many months over heavily forested terrain.

During the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], it was destroyed by [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] who swung two tree trunks into the cockpit.
